The '''X10-D draft droid''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] developed by the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Species/Legends|species]] for labor. They were able to pick up things that Trandoshans—due to their claws—could not. Only those deemed worthy by the [[Scorekeeper/Legends|Scorekeeper]]—those who had achieved a significant number of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] kills—could own a draft droid.<ref name="EGD" />

==Characteristics==
The X10-D was over 3 meters tall, with extendable arms that could reach a distance of 3 meters. They moved via treaded feet. The droids were not equipped with internal cognitive modules or [[Behavioral circuitry matrix/Legends|behavioral matrices]] which required them to be controlled by a central computer.<ref name="EGD" />

==History==
The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] once owned a red and bronze [[X10-D]], which he used aboard his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the [[Hound's Tooth/Legends|''Hound's Tooth'']]. The droid's mind was replaced with that of [[Flirt]].

The [[Bartokk Queen]] and a hive took a number of X10-Ds and input hidden mini [[Plasma bomb/Legends|plasma bombs]] as part of their plan to attack [[Corulag Academy]].

{{Droid-stub}}
